headline: Agoda and Macao Government Tourism Office Deepen 2026 Partnership to Spotlight Macao's Unique Stays
summary: Digital travel platform Agoda expands its partnership with the Macao Government Tourism Office (MGTO) to promote Macao's boutique and independent hotels, bringing more visibility to stays that sit beyond the city's most familiar clusters. The 2026 collaboration will spotlight properties in Macao's Outer Harbour District (including ZAPE and NAPE districts) a well-connected waterfront close to the city center.
